articles.title: INTERVIEW: Grant Dawson Responds To “Glass Jawson” Critics
articles.description: Grant Dawson joins Michael Bisping and Paul Felder after his latest UFC win to break down the chaos of his fight with Remi Barki, getting rocked, battling through adversity, and finding the third-round choke. Dawson opens up on being called “Glass Jawson,” proving his toughness, the politics of training at ATT with future opponents, and why he thinks Ilia Topuria may be the best fighter at lightweight. articles.title: King Green Calls Out Moicano For A $50K Bitcoin Bet, Wants BMF!, Nate Diaz | INTERVIEW
articles.description: Michael Bisping and Paul Felder are joined by King Green after his latest win to talk about proving the doubters wrong, chasing the BMF belt, wanting to honour Nate Diaz, Jeremy Stephens missing weight, missing out on another bonus, and his wild idea for a $50,000 Bitcoin bet with Renato Moicano. They also break down Sean Strickland’s shocking win over Khamzat Chimaev, what went wrong for Khamzat, and what could be next at middleweight. articles.title: 'What's NEXT For Khamzat?' | UFC 328 AFTERMATH
articles.description: Michael Bisping reacts after Sean Strickland shocked the world, defeated Khamzat Chimaev, ended his undefeated record and became UFC champion once again. Bisping breaks down Strickland’s performance, Khamzat’s cardio issues, the shoulder injury Strickland revealed after the fight, why the rivalry cooled down after the final bell, and what could be next for both men — including possible fights with Nassourdine Imavov, Joe Pyfer, Paulo Costa, Jiri Prochazka and more. 🔒 Become a Member for special Perks, Exclusive Content and ultra-exclusive Live Chats: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDrG2_1TcVkXKXXsD6Kjwig/join ▶️ Follow Michael on Social: https://www.instagram.com/mikebisping https://www.twitter.com/bisping https://www.facebook.com/mikethecountbisping ▶️ Edited by John Brannigan: https://www.instagram.com/johnbranniganuk https://www.twitter.com/johnbranniganuk #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews #ufc328 #khamzat #khamzatchimaev #seanstrickland

articles.title: Khamzat MISSES Weight!? | White House Press Conference CHAOS!! | BISPING REACTS
articles.description: For a limited time, download the Kalshi app and use code BISPING to get ten dollars when you trade ten - https://kalshi.com Michael Bisping reacts to the chaotic UFC White House Freedom 250 press conference, where Josh Hokit stole the show after going off on Derrick Lewis, Alex Pereira and Ilia Topuria before being removed from the stage. Bisping also breaks down the controversy around Khamzat Chimaev’s UFC 328 weigh-in ahead of his title fight with Sean Strickland, Bryce Mitchell’s reaction, Ilia Topuria promising to break Justin Gaethje’s jaw, Ciryl Gane facing Alex Pereira, Tom Aspinall’s recovery and the special Freedom 250 belts. articles.title: 'Khamzat KICKS Strickland!' | BISPING REACTS to UFC 328 PRESS CONFERENCE
articles.description: Sean Strickland and Khamzat Chimaev delivered an old-school UFC press conference full of chaos, insults, face-off drama and serious tension ahead of their massive fight on Saturday night. Michael Bisping reacts to the heated back-and-forth, Khamzat targeting Strickland with personal trash talk, Sean firing back, Dana White allowing the face-off, and why this fight now feels like one of the most hyped matchups of the year. Plus, Bisping breaks down how Strickland can give himself a real chance against the undefeated Khamzat by turning it into a war, pushing the pace, forcing scrambles and making Khamzat work deep into the later rounds. 🔒 Become a Member for special Perks, Exclusive Content and ultra-exclusive Live Chats: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDrG2_1TcVkXKXXsD6Kjwig/join ▶️ Follow Michael on Social: https://www.instagram.com/mikebisping https://www.twitter.com/bisping https://www.facebook.com/mikethecountbisping ▶️ Edited by John Brannigan: https://www.instagram.com/johnbranniganuk https://www.twitter.com/johnbranniganuk #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews #ufc328 #khamzat #khamzatchimaev #seanstrickland
